REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, PLAINTIFF DCP SF COLUMBUS AVE OWNER, LLC MOTION TO STRIKE ANSWER TO COMPLAINT IS GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART. PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO STRIKE ANSWER IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. CORPORATE DEFENDANT HAS BEEN UNREPRESENTED SINCE MAY 6, 2024. THERE IS NO INDICATION ON THE COURT RECORD (AND NO OPPOSITION FILED) SUGGESTING THAT CORPORATION IS OBTAINING COUNSEL. PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO ENTER DEFAULT AGAINST DEFENDANT IS DENIED FOR PLAINTIFF TO REQUEST A DEFAULT FROM THE CLERK OF COURT. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES; CLERK: VANESSA WU; NOT REPORTED. (D501)

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Nov-05-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:27 am and concluding at 9:46 am.

Plaintiff DCP SF Columbus Ave Owner, LLC. is represented by Antony Nash, Esq.
Defendant Excel Hotel Services, Inc. not appearing.

Plaintiff presents summary of facts, claims and an offer of proof.

JOHN HOFFART is sworn to testify on behalf of the Plaintiff and testifies.

The matter is submitted.
By the statements made by Plaintiff and its counsel, documents filed, and evidence presented, the Court finds that Plaintiff has provided sufficient evidence proving each element of the complaint.

Good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff DCP SF Columbus Ave Owner, LLC., and against Defendant Excel Hotel Services, Inc., as follows:

1. Damages: $1,781,363.00
2. Prejudgment Interest: $700,825.44
3. Costs: $5,245.63
4. Attorney fees: $61,294.07

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $2,548,728.14

Proposed judgment to be submitted by counsel. (D505)

MOTION TO STRIKE ANSWER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-10-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

PLAINTIFF DCP SF COLUMBUS AVE OWNER, LLC MOTION TO STRIKE ANSWER TO COMPLAINT is GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Plaintiff's motion to strike answer is granted. No opposition filed. Corporate defendant has been unrepresented since May 6, 2024. There is no indication on the Court record (and no opposition filed) suggesting that corporation is obtaining counsel. Plaintiff's motion to enter default against Defendant is denied for Plaintiff to request a default from the clerk of court.

Prevailing party to prepare order. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Vanessa Wu; Not Reported. (D501)
